scripts.lint:cssd-architecture: eslint src/app/cssd-erp src/app/cssd-quy-trinh src/app/cssd-dung-cu src/app/cssd-su-co src/app/cssd-thiet-bi src/app/cssd-hoa-chat src/app/cssd-tiep-nhan src/modules/cssd-erp/contexts --cache --cache-location .next/cache/eslint-cssd-architecture --max-warnings=0
scripts.verify:full: npm run lint && npm run layout:drift-check && npm run verify:cssd && npm run verify:engineering && npm run build
scripts.cssd:db:audit: npx supabase db query --linked --agent=no -f scripts/sql/cssd-tram-fk-health-audit.sql -o table
scripts.cssd:db:audit:local: npx supabase db query --local --agent=no -f scripts/sql/cssd-tram-fk-health-audit.sql -o table
scripts.verify:cssd: npm run lint:cssd-architecture && npm run imports:cssd-mdm && npm run test:cssd -- src/modules/cssd-erp src/modules/cssd-su-co/domain
scripts.trial:prep: npm run env:bootstrap && npm run env:check
scripts.pilot:ship: npm run env:check && npm run verify:engineering && npm run build && npm run mdm:migrate && npm run trial:db:precheck
scripts.trial:auth:precheck: npx supabase db query --linked --agent=no -f scripts/sql/auth-pilot-precheck.sql -o table
scripts.trial:auth:precheck:local: npx supabase db query --local --agent=no -f scripts/sql/auth-pilot-precheck.sql -o table
scripts.mdm:migrate: export SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN=$(grep ^SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN .env.local | cut -d= -f2-) && npx supabase db push
scripts.mdm:postcheck:sql: SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN=$(grep SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN .env.local | cut -d= -f2) npx supabase db query --linked --agent=no -f scripts/master-data-cutover-postcheck.sql
scripts.mdm:postcheck:fk: SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN=$(grep SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN .env.local | cut -d= -f2) npx supabase db query --linked --agent=no -f scripts/sql/fk-public-referencing-danh-muc-tuy-bien.sql
scripts.verify:mdm: npm run mdm:coverage:gate && npm run mdm:postcheck:sql && npm run mdm:postcheck:fk
scripts.verify:mdm:local: npm run mdm:coverage:gate && npm run mdm:postcheck:sql:local && npm run mdm:postcheck:fk:local
scripts.skills:sync: node -e "console.warn('[BV103] Không đồng bộ full marketplace — thêm từng skill: npx skills add … rồi npm run skills:lock'); process.exit(0)"
scripts.skills:sync:softaworks-react-dev: npx skills add softaworks/agent-toolkit -s react-dev -a cursor -y --copy && npm run skills:lock
scripts.skills:sync:reviewing-code: npx skills add spencerpauly/awesome-cursor-skills -a cursor -s reviewing-code -y --copy && npm run skills:lock
scripts.verify:engineering: npm run engineering:baseline && npm run engineering:contract:gate
scripts.verify:admin: npm run admin:health:check && npm run verify:engineering
